message:
feat(polyfill): add guards for Buffer and crypto native modules

- Buffer: Only create JS Buffer if globalThis.Buffer doesn't exist (native Zig)
- Crypto: Only create JS crypto if _modules.crypto doesn't exist (native Zig)
- Native modules provide zero-allocation, optimized implementations
- JS polyfills now serve as fallback only
- Continue 'thin JS / host rich Zig' architecture migration

Native implementations:
- Buffer: src/polyfills/buffer.zig (from, alloc, concat, etc.)
- Crypto: src/polyfills/crypto.zig (hash, hmac, aesGcm, etc.)
